name: feedback-fix-in-dev-first
tags: deploy, worktree, fix, dev, test, main, workflow, pipeline
body:
Always fix issues in the dev worktree first, even when the bug is discovered in test or main.

**Why:** Dev is the only place changes should originate — test and main are downstream. Fixing directly in test/main breaks the dev→test→main pipeline and risks divergence.

**How to apply:** When a test failure or bug surfaces during deploy (unit gate, full suite, or post-ship), stop, go to dev, fix there, commit via /gc, then re-run /deploy from the top.
